current_development_scope: V15 observability, deployment and final interaction baseline prototype
closed_gaps_before_v15_implementation: V14 dependency is satisfied by V14-SA PASS evidence.
V15 implementation contract now defines routes, DTOs, evidence artifacts and stop conditions.
V15 acceptance schema and artifact manifest schema are present.
stop_conditions: Deployment smoke without actual command or HTTP output.
Observability dashboard mutates or invents runtime truth.
Xpert references or planning documents are counted as HarnessOS implementation evidence.
Forbidden production, Xpert parity, product-grade frontend, complete Studio or Agent executor claims appear outside safe scan context.
audit_opinion: The V15 document set now supports bounded V15 implementation and end-to-end acceptance planning. If implementation follows these documents and passes the required evidence runner, the resulting stage can support frontend interaction baseline ready for review only.
allowed_claims: V15 frontend interaction baseline ready for review.
